data.description_suggestion: Removes a key-value pair from the key-value store. The key is specified in the URL path. Once deleted, the key and its associated value are permanently removed and cannot be retrieved. Returns a success confirmation or error if the key does not exist.

message: Operation 'enqueue' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks context about queue behavior and return value. Added details about queue naming, item data source, FIFO processing order, and response format to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Enqueues a message or item to a named queue for asynchronous processing. The queue name is specified in the URL path. The item data is provided in the request body. The item is added to the end of the queue and will be processed by queue consumers in FIFO order. Returns a confirmation with the item ID or queue position.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about queue behavior and return value. Added details about queue naming, item data source, FIFO processing order, and response format to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.
